title: HTML
desc: The language pages are built with. You touch code from the first minute — you don't watch a video, you write.

intro.title: Introduction to HTML
intro.desc: You touch code from the first minute. No theory — first you do it, then you understand why it worked.

content.title: Text & Content
content.desc: Bring your text to life. Hierarchy, paragraphs, emphasis and lists that mean something.

media.title: Links, Images & Media
media.desc: Your page stops being alone. You link it to others, show images, and learn why file paths break more sites than anything else.

semantic.title: Meaning & Structure
semantic.desc: Your code works. Now you learn why that is not enough — and how to write HTML that says what a thing IS, not how it looks.

tables.title: Tables
tables.desc: Data in rows and columns. A short section — with one question almost everyone gets wrong: when a table is right, and when it is the mistake.

forms.title: Forms
forms.desc: The page stops talking and starts listening. Fields, buttons — and one tag almost nobody adds, without which the form is unusable for half the people.

final.title: The Finish
final.desc: Two things remain: telling the phone the truth, and building everything from scratch, on your own.
